title: Junior Business Development Manager at IndiGrid

jsonLd.title: Junior Business Development Manager at IndiGrid
jsonLd.description:
IndiGrid, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Business Development Manager for our Kolkata operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About IndiGrid:
IndiGrid is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in AutoCAD

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Flexible working hours
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Kolkata, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IndiGrid!
